name: mathematical-guides-transformers
description: Transformer Mathematics: a formal Definition-Theorem-Proof treatment of sequence models, from recurrent networks and state space models through attention and transformers to hybrid architectures and vision-language. A mathematical-guides family sibling; deploys to /transformers/.

scripts.predev: npm run build:bib --if-present && npm run build:labels --if-present
scripts.prebuild: npm run build:bib --if-present && npm run build:labels --if-present && npm run build:figures --if-present && npm run validate --if-present
scripts.prevalidate: npm run build:bib --if-present && npm run build:labels --if-present
